anchor.note: local sprite-space contact point (bottom of the base foot ring); engine positions this pixel at the table/hand anchor it is placed on — not a fixed scene coordinate, this prop is reused across tables A-E.

review_notes: Classic 10-12 facet Soviet tumbler (граненый стакан), empty. Light upper-left convention matches char scripts: soot_4 lit facet band / soot_3 mid / soot_2 shadow facet, cream_3 2px rim glint, soot_1 base foot. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Inspected at 8x. PROP-001 ledger entry status is 'unverified' per HISTORICAL_LEDGER.csv — needs a dated catalog/photo source before final approval.
